title: Kvak Modpack 1
description: A huge techno-magical modpack with over 300 mods
body:
# The first modpack from the KvakPack series.

This large-scale modpack consisting of more than 300 mods combines several directions:


## Exploring the world:

An incredible number of different biomes and structures will make your journey exciting, and a variety of bosses will add dynamics and danger.

## Magic:

You will be able to create altars and pentagrams to create rituals that will help strengthen your spells and create new unusual things. Mods like Occultism and Malum will help you.

## Industrialization:

Create factories and plants, develop new machines and mechanisms. For example, there are Create and Thermal Expansion mods.

## A few other mods:

Tinkers Construct — You can also create hundreds of combinations of new tools.\

## Multiplayer

This modpack was developed for the game by a small campaign of friends.


### Other information:

<details>
<summary>System requirements:</summary>

Since the modpack is very large, you need to allocate at least 6 GB of RAM, and for a comfortable game it is better to put 8 GB.

</details>

<details>
<summary>A list of all mods and links to them</summary>

Check out the projects I'm using in my modpack!
